strengths: 20 years of continuous engineering experience exceeding the 15-year requirement, with clear progression to Staff-level roles
Proven full-stack technical builder across web, mobile, embedded systems who ships and maintains products (GISCollective, multiple commercial platforms)
Recent pivot into AI infrastructure (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows at re:cinq) demonstrates openness to learning emerging domains
concerns: AI expertise is extremely recent (2 months at re:cinq) and focused on infrastructure/tooling rather than strategic product development or recognized AI domain expertise
No demonstrated AI products or platforms—the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'
No evidence of director-level strategic leadership, customer advisory work, or influence on cloud/AI product direction—resume shows excellent craftsperson skills but minimal strategic influence
response.justification: Bogdan is a capable Staff-level engineer with 20 years of experience and recent AI engagement, but the Principal Engineer role requires director-level strategic influence and recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products. His AI work (2 months, infrastructure/tooling focused) falls short of the explicit requirement for 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products.' His resume shows excellence as an individual contributor and systems builder, but lacks evidence of strategic product direction, customer advisory capability, or the Master's/PhD in AI preferred for this strategy-focused role. The technical foundation is solid, but the specific director-level AI strategy requirements are not met.
